tree.text: Present perfect and past 2 | I have done and I did (现在完成时与一般过去时对比 2)

children.text: Finished Time (已结束时间 - 用一般过去时)
Do not use present perfect with finished time (yesterday / last year / ten minutes ago / in 2005 / when I was a child) (不能将现在完成时与已结束的时间词连用)
Use the past simple to ask 'When...?' or 'What time...?' (用一般过去时询问 When...? 或 What time...?)
Unfinished Time (未结束时间 - 用现在完成时)
Use the present perfect for a period of time that continues until now (today / this week / recently / since 2010) (使用现在完成时表示持续到现在的未结束时间段)
today (unfinished) vs yesterday (finished) (今天-未结束 vs 昨天-已结束)
Have you seen Anna this morning? (still morning) vs Did you see Anna this morning? (now afternoon/evening) (早上见安娜了吗？当前是否仍在早上)
He has lived there for 7 years (still lives there) vs He lived there for 10 years (no longer lives there) (居住状态：现在仍在住 vs 过去住过)
It was very cold yesterday. (昨天非常冷。)
Paul and Lucy arrived ten minutes ago. (保罗和露西十分钟前到了。)
Did you eat a lot of sweets when you were a child? (你小时候吃很多糖果吗？)
Emily has earned a lot of money this year. (埃米莉今年赚了很多钱。)
My grandfather died before I was born. I never met him. (祖父在我出生前去世，我从未见过他。)
